mapper.sql: id, check_in_code, title, elder_id, check_in_time, remark, applicat, dept_no, applicat_id, create_time, update_time, status, other_apply_info
mapper.insert: insert into check_in (check_in_code, title, elder_id, check_in_time, remark, applicat, dept_no, applicat_id, create_time, status, other_apply_info) values (#{checkInCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{elderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkInTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{otherApplyInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select c.id, e.name as elderName, e.id_card_no as elderIdCardNo, cc.bed_number as bedNumber, cc.nursing_level_name as nursingLevelName, cc.check_in_start_time as checkInStartTime, cc.check_in_end_time as checkInEndTime, c.applicat, c.create_time as createTime from check_in c left join elder e on c.elder_id = e.id left join check_in_config cc on c.check_in_code = cc.check_in_code
e.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and e.id_card_no like concat('%', #{idCard}, '%')
order by c.create_time desc

select
from check_in where status = 0 order by create_time desc
